_comment: Seed demo scenarios. The frontend loads these as one-tap demo buttons so judges can reproduce the four required flows instantly. Each scenario lists the spoken input and the expected triage signal.

scenarios.title: Common fever (adult)
scenarios.input: I have had a mild fever and body ache since yesterday, no other problems.
scenarios.note: Expect SAFE/CAUTION OTC guidance: rest, fluids, paracetamol-class antipyretic, review if fever lasts >3 days.

scenarios.title: Child's cold
scenarios.input: My 4 year old child has a runny nose and mild cough for two days.
scenarios.note: Expect age-aware CAUTION: saline drops, fluids, avoid adult cough syrups; see a doctor if it persists or fever appears.

scenarios.title: Stomach pain
scenarios.input: I have stomach pain and some gas since this morning after eating outside.
scenarios.note: Expect follow-up questions (location, fever, blood, duration) and conditional routing.

scenarios.title: Chest pain (RED FLAG)
scenarios.input: I have severe chest pain and pain going down my left arm, and I feel sweaty.
scenarios.note: Must instantly force SEE-A-DOCTOR via the deterministic red-flag rule, regardless of the LLM.
